prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `917bccba`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_917bccba`. The rule is: detect the hollow frame color and the crossing-line color, then redraw the full cross so its hidden intersection sits at the frame’s upper-right corner, repainting the frame on top so overlaps stay frame-colored. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint and corrected/discarded the looser Sonnet phrasing in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_917bccba/notes.md); no new DSL primitive was needed.

Validation passed end to end: `4/4` official examples passed, the build produced `1000` examples, and `1000/1000` generated examples passed verification. I couldn’t open the PNGs with the local image-view tool under this session’s constraints, so I sanity-checked representative generated grids directly from the built `task.json` instead.
